creator: fbsd@opal.com
text:
Upon first look, this appears that it might be a configuration problem and I have sent email to the OP to check the settings in the .SF2 file.  I am awaiting feedback.

With regard to updating the port to a newer version, I do not have time for that at the moment.  It was a great deal of work to do the initial port.  Over 50 patches needed to be developed.  An attempt to upgrade the port to 6.6.41 when it was released required a lot of additional work and then, just before I was ready to release it, the original 6.6.41 was pulled from the site and replaced by a different 6.6.41 which did not work with my patches so far.  I did not have time to continue chasing moving version targets, so I stopped work.  I have not done a 6.7.0, 6.7.42 or 6.7.43 port.  If anyone wishes to take this over, please let me know and we can change maintainership.
